matches.match_rationale: Multi-step manual workflow of overtime/bonus claims requiring calculation, approvals, and disbursement.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An AI agent that ingests supplementary pay claims, validates calculations, routes for approval, and tracks status.

matches.match_rationale: Supplementary payroll items originate in semi-structured sources that need normalizing.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An ETL layer normalizing overtime claims, bonus submissions, and exit pay triggers into a structured payroll queue.

matches.match_rationale: Incoming requests arrive with varying terminology and urgency that classification can triage.
matches.opportunity_sketch: Automatically classify and prioritize incoming supplementary pay requests by type and urgency.

matches.match_rationale: Auto-generate status notifications to keep staff informed without burdening the payroll team.
matches.opportunity_sketch: Auto-generate status update emails triggered by workflow state changes.

matches.match_rationale: Payroll staff must frequently look up policy rules for edge cases.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A payroll policy assistant that answers calculation and entitlement questions by retrieving relevant clauses.
